summary: Documentation build failed due to an unresolved git merge conflict marker in transformers/modeling_utils.py. The conflict marker `<<<<<<< sonic-moe` at line 1974 causes a Python SyntaxError when the code is imported during doc building.
root_cause: Unresolved git merge conflict marker (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`) in transformers/modeling_utils.py at line 1974 prevents Python from parsing the file, triggering a SyntaxError during module import.

evidence.reason: This is a git merge conflict marker left in the code, which is invalid Python syntax
The Python parser cannot interpret the merge conflict marker as valid code
Points to the exact location of the syntax error in the source file

evidence.quote: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
evidence.reason: The doc build failed when trying to import transformers modules, which triggered the SyntaxError

suggested_fix: Resolve the git merge conflict in transformers/modeling_utils.py at line 1974 by removing the conflict markers (`<<<<<<<`, `=======`, `>>>>>>>`) and keeping the correct version of the code, then commit the fix.
